title: tetragonolobus purpureus
intro: Tetragonolobus purpureus, also known as Horse Bean or Four-angled Bean, is a perennial legume native to Asia, characterized by its distinctive four-angled pods and purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Tetragonolobus purpureus include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Tetragonolobus purpureus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
